---
applyTo: "**/*.{tsx,jsx,css,scss}"
---
# Frontend Rules
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Tailwind CSS utility classes
- CSS custom properties for theming
- Animations: CSS transitions preferred, Framer Motion for complex
- next/image with proper width/height/alt
- Semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation
- Reference: .agent/skills/ultimate-frontend-design/SKILL.md
